title: Create item in new board from the item update section
excerpt:
Is there a way to create a new item from the item update section? 
For example, if I added an update on an item and I would like to create a to-do task from this update in other board.

posts.author: Zahavit (Zahavit Simhayev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to create a new item from the item update section?
For example, if I added an update on an item and I would like to create a to-do task from this update in other board.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
This one just showed up in my ‘new’ section, so my apologies if you’ve already figured it out. But this can be done with the new workflow center.
